on

Greek Super League club, Olympiacos are interested in Umar Sadiq.

Sadiq is looking to leave LaLiga side, Real Sociedad this summer after struggling to feature regularly for the club last season.

The 27-year-old started 14 out of 34 games for Real Sociedad last season.

According to Greek news outlet, B92 Sport, Olympiacos are keen to add the lanky striker to their squad.

The forward has played for clubs in Italy, the Netherlands, Scotland, Serbia, and Spain in the past.

He has been linked with a number of clubs in Spain including Getafe, Sevilla and Valencia.
